definition: The occurrence of events by chance in a happy or beneficial way.
usage: Finding the book in a charity shop was pure serendipity.
Her laconic reply made it clear the meeting was over.

definition: The realization that each passerby has a life as vivid and complex as your own.
usage: On the train home, he felt a sudden wave of sonder.

definition: Lasting for a very short time.
usage: The beauty of the cherry blossoms was fleeting and ephemeral.
She gave a candid interview about the challenges she faced.

definition: Fluent or persuasive in speaking or writing.
usage: His eloquent speech moved the entire audience.
Her tenacious efforts finally paid off.

definition: Showing great attention to detail; very careful and precise.
usage: He kept meticulous records of every transaction.

definition: Able to withstand or recover quickly from difficult conditions.
usage: The community proved resilient in the face of adversity.

definition: Having mixed feelings or contradictory ideas about something.
usage: She felt ambivalent about moving abroad.

definition: Dealing with things sensibly and realistically.
usage: They took a pragmatic approach to solving the issue.
Smartphones have become ubiquitous in modern life.

definition: New or unusual in an interesting way.
usage: The company introduced a novel solution to the problem.
